name: ahorn-friendly-captcha-neos
description: An Ahorn plugin for Neos CMS integrating Friendly Captcha to provide privacy-friendly, bot-resistant form protection via NPM-delivered JavaScript assets.

scripts.build:friendlycaptcha: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const destDir=path.resolve(__dirname,'../Public/JavaScript/FriendlyCaptcha'); fs.mkdirSync(destDir,{recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync(path.resolve(__dirname,'node_modules/@friendlycaptcha/sdk/site.min.js'), path.join(destDir,'site.min.js')); fs.copyFileSync(path.resolve(__dirname,'node_modules/@friendlycaptcha/sdk/site.compat.min.js'), path.join(destDir,'site.compat.min.js'));"

author: ahorn.gmbh
